THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAN, JIA XIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 434 LEAVENWORTH #310, STAYED UNTIL AUG-06-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, END OF DAY. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR $840. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS.
